title: persea borbonia subsp. humilis
intro: Persea borbonia subsp. humilis, also known as the dwarf red bay or red bay, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Persea borbonia subsp. humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
